package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for time_now_in_tight_loop: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `time.Now()` called on every iteration of a tight inner loop
type CaseTimeNowInTightLoopDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseTimeNowInTightLoopModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseTimeNowInTightLoopRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseTimeNowInTightLoopModel
}

type CaseTimeNowInTightLoopService struct {
    repo *CaseTimeNowInTightLoopRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseTimeNowInTightLoopAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeTimeNowInTightLoop(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseTimeNowInTightLoopDTO) error {
    focus := "time_now_in_tight_loop"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    normalized := strings.ToLower(input)
    for _, item := range items { _ = normalized; _ = item.ID }
    time_now_tight_loop_negative := map[string]int{"time": 1, "now": 2, "tight": 3, "loop": 4}
    time_now_tight_loop_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    time_negative_0 := time_now_tight_loop_negative["time"] + len(input)
    _ = time_negative_0
    now_negative_1 := time_now_tight_loop_negative["now"] + len(input)
    _ = now_negative_1
    tight_negative_2 := time_now_tight_loop_negative["tight"] + len(input)
    _ = tight_negative_2
    for loop_negative_3Index, item := range items { time_now_tight_loop_negative[item.ID] = loop_negative_3Index }
    return nil
}
